label: 第267話
source_locator: 単行本30巻 目次 p.66
summary_short: 乙骨がリカに宿儺の最後の指を食べさせたという説明は欺瞞で、実際には虎杖の指を利用して御厨子を模倣していた。生存していた釘崎が宿儺の最後の指へ共鳴りを打ち込み、虎杖と伏黒を援護する。
summary_full: 乙骨がリカに宿儺の最後の指を食べさせたという説明は欺瞞で、実際には虎杖の指を利用して御厨子を模倣していた。生存していた釘崎が宿儺の最後の指へ共鳴りを打ち込み、虎杖と伏黒を援護する。乙骨が宿儺の指を食べたという説明は偽装で、模倣に使ったのは虎杖の指だった。目覚めた釘崎が最後の指へ共鳴りを打ち、宿儺の領域と術式を妨害する。

candidate_evidence.summary_short_legacy: 乙骨憂太 was bluffing when he told 宿儺 that 里香 consumed his last finger. The truth is revealed as an ally long thought dead makes a surprising return to help 悠仁 and 恵 end the cycle of curses once and for all.
candidate_evidence.summary_full_legacy: While undergoing replacement training and having their souls swapped, 憂太 asked 五条 to give him 宿儺 's last finger so 里香 could ingest it and copy 御廚子 for him. 五条 disapproved of the idea, as consuming the finger wouldn't be enough for 憂太 to analyze its techniques. 憂太 agreed with the statement, remembering when he learned more about 呪言 from 狗巻 . 五条 believed they should keep the last finger to not lose their connection with 宿儺 and gamble for an opportunity to exploit it. He then suggested another way for 憂太 to copy 御廚子. Some time later, 憂太 discussed the conditions of his technique with 悠仁 , 冥冥 , and 憂憂 . In order to copy a 術式 , 里香 needed to consume a part of the original owner's body. Depending on the technique he is copying and how many times he wants to use it, the body part and amount of it changes, meaning 里香 needs to consume a body part more vital to a sorcerer in order to copy a stronger technique. However, 憂太 could circumvent this condition by limiting the number of times he uses the technique with a 縛り . 悠仁 wondered if it was possible for 憂太 to copy 五条's 無下限呪術 and 秤 's technique without disabling them since they could use 反転術式 to regenerate the missing body parts. 憂太 refuted this idea, revealing that a consumed body part that is then regenerated would cease to meet the requirements of 模倣. 狗巻 and 華 allowed him to use their arms since they couldn't be healed with modern medicine or 反転術式, while シャルル had to lose a rib for 憂太 to copy his G戦杖 . 冥冥 quietly cautioned 憂太 against revealing this information to 悠仁, worried about the resonance between 悠仁 and 宿儺. 憂太 assured her that he will only put his plan into motion right before they fight 宿儺 and give 悠仁 the minimum amount of necessary information. He reasoned that even if 悠仁 and 宿儺's resonance could detect physical changes, 宿儺 wouldn't be able to detect 悠仁's thoughts or information since 悠仁 couldn't vice versa. With the chaos that will follow after 五条's fight , 憂太 doubts 宿儺 would learn about the plan, but more than anything he didn't want to distract 悠仁 before it. 憂太 then told 悠仁 that 御廚子 was engraved in him and asked him to let him copy it. "You better be happy, boys!" In the present, 宿儺 notices that 悠仁 is missing two fingers on his left hand. Remembering that he only removed the little finger to incarnate in 恵 , 宿儺 recalls 憂太's words about his last finger and realizes that it was a bluff, as 憂太 copied 御廚子 using 悠仁's finger instead of his. At the secret location that held 宿儺's last finger, 楽巌寺 and 歌姫 overlook the 呪物 . The Kyoto 呪術高専 wonders how a 術式 could penetrate the special grade 呪物 when it is impervious to physical force and jujutsu sorcery alike. 歌姫 reveals that it could be done with a 縛り that forgoes destroying the 呪物 in order to allow the technique's effects to pass through, though she is more worried about the condition of a person who hasn't even been awake for half an hour. That person is revealed to be 釘崎野薔薇 , adorned with an eyepatch as she tells her friends to rejoice! Striking a nail through the finger, 野薔薇 activates 共鳴り , causing multiple nails to subsequently burst out of 宿儺's chest! Recognizing 野薔薇's technique, a panicking 宿儺 realizes that his technique was disrupted, preventing him from expanding his domain and subjecting him to 悠仁's domain's sure-hit effect. Smiling with the knowledge that his friend is alive, 悠仁 activates the sure-hit effect and rends 宿儺's soul with 解 before kneeing him in the face. 悠仁 defeats 宿儺! The two then engage in hand-to-hand combat as 悠仁 punches 宿儺 squarely in the face, forcing him to throw up the fingers he ingested. As they trade blows, 宿儺 remains confident that 悠仁 would lose; the boy has expended too much 呪力 to expand the domain that he couldn't even heal himself with 反転術式. A glancing blow to his face followed by a double impact surprises 宿儺 and leaves him open to attacks. As he looks down at 悠仁, the latter charges up 呪力 in his right fist before announcing to 宿儺 that it is time to end the cycle of curses. With a powerful uppercut to 宿儺's abdomen that triggers a 黒閃 , the King of Curses is knocked out as his eyes roll back, signaling the end of the fight.
candidate_evidence.characters_raw_text: 五条悟 (回想) 乙骨憂太 (回想) 狗巻棘 (回想) 冥冥 (回想) 憂憂 (回想) 烏鷺亨子 (回想) 来栖華 (回想) シャルル ベルナール (回想) 秤金次 (回想) 東堂葵 (言及のみ) 虎杖悠仁 宿儺 伏黒恵 (言及のみ) 楽巌寺嘉伸 庵歌姫 釘崎野薔薇
candidate_evidence.locations_raw_text: 東京／白丸ダム調整池 (想像) 白丸ダム調整池 (想像)
candidate_evidence.techniques_raw_text: 呪物 両面宿儺's 宿儺の指 (x1) 釘崎野薔薇の術式 芻霊呪法 術式 共鳴り 宿儺の術式 反転術式 術式 虎杖悠仁の術式 黒閃 逕庭拳 御廚子 解 解

key_events_verified_phase11: 乙骨がリカに宿儺の最後の指を食べさせたという説明は欺瞞で、実際には虎杖の指を利用して御厨子を模倣していた。
生存していた釘崎が宿儺の最後の指へ共鳴りを打ち込み、虎杖と伏黒を援護する。
乙骨が宿儺の指を食べたという説明は偽装で、模倣に使ったのは虎杖の指だった。
目覚めた釘崎が最後の指へ共鳴りを打ち、宿儺の領域と術式を妨害する。
verification_notes_phase11: 集英社公式24～30巻目次・巻概要、日本語の原作漫画巻別資料、旧候補資料を話単位で突合した最終区間。単行本各ページの直接最終照合前。
